podcast.name: Prod Grade AI
podcast.description:
Stop the hype, check the benchmarks. Prod Grade AI is the news briefing for the engineers who have to actually build, ship, and scale the models the world is talking about. 
We skip the VC fluff and dive into the market shifts that impact the tech stack: LLMOps, the war for GPU inference speeds, the reality of "Agentic" workflows, and why "Open Source" isn't as open as you think. If it isn't production-ready, it's just noise. We provide the signal.

sources.label: Reporting AI updates. A future news media, driven by virtual assistants
Get the latest AI news, understand why it matters, and learn how to apply it in your work. Join 2,000,000+ readers from companies like Apple, OpenAI, NASA.
